title: Cappuccino Hearts
description: A Resource pack for minecraft that changes the look of hearts. Inspired by Cappuccino Color Palette.
body:
# **CappuccinoHearts☕**

A minecraft resource pack



## 📔What is this pack does?
This pack changes the look of the hearts for more [Cappuccino styled one](https://www.color-hex.com/color-palette/389).
### Was changed:

- Base hearts
- Poisened hearts
- Withered hearts
- Absorbing hearts

All of those u can see on the table

<details>
<summary>Table of all types of hearts added</summary>

![table:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENHlRSNA/images/57a75f5e14e794ee8f5d61d4aae89747c3672cc6.png)

</details>
